texto: Preserve your own mystery. We live in an age of social media and what seems like extreme sharing of personal details. I would beg to differ that these revelations are not honest truths but more self-branding. Whatever the case, save a little bit, or a lot, for yourself. If you run around naked all the time, when the storm hits, you’ll have no raincoat.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Susan Kirschbaum: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Preserve your own mystery. We live in an age of social media and what seems like extreme sharing …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, author, quote pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e quote.
